ability.hint: An ability that an actor can use. These cannot go on actors directly and must be embedded in some item.

archetype.hint: An item containing abilities that a whole family of classes share.

attunement.hint: A tracker representing attunement with some item or effect.

base.hint: A generic effect that doesn't have any particular rules purpose.

body.hint: Armaments that are part of an actor's body.

character.hint: A named actor with specific stats and abilities.

condition.hint: A pre-defined static effect on an actor.

consequence.hint: An effect that lingers on an actor as the result of some ability.

cover.hint: The effect of being in some type of cover.

creature.hint: Actors best suited for monsters and reusable baddies.

damage.hint: Rules text and automations for a damage type.

drain.hint: Rules text and automations for a drain type.

equipment.hint: Armaments that exist independently of an actor.

fluency.hint: A fluency in a particular tradecraft.

hack.hint: Rules text and automations describing a specific type of hack damage on an actor.

imbuement.hint: An effect that lingers on an armament as the result of some ability.

inventory.hint: An actor representing a bag, chest, or shared storage rather than some being.

mount.hint: An item representing the effects gained by riding on some other being.

power.hint: A generic item that contain a number of effects.

property.hint: An effect that defines additional rules for what an armament does or how it's used.

rank.hint: The abilities and other effects gained from a rank in a class.

rule.hint: Rules text for a core rule, condition, keyword, or similar entry.

resource.hint: An abstract counter representing something that needs tracking.

species.hint: The collection of powers that a being gains from their species type.

stone.hint: A stone from the death bag.
